text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin isn't looking well, so I accompany
her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. You worry too much.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna snooze so leave me alone and get back
to work.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Where am I?
Taishin... Taishiiiiin...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Is that Ticket? She's usually so much
louder...

text_block_list.name: Teensy Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin, TAISHIIIIN! I'm down heeeeere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket?! Why are you so small?! You look like a
grain of rice!

text_block_list.name: Pint-size Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! Watch where you're stepping! I'd really rather
not be squished.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're tiny too, Hayahide?! What in the world...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pffhaha! You two're so cute!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So this is what it feels like to look down on you
guys. Huh, not bad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Want me to carry you around in my pocket? It's
dangerous for you to run around like that since
you're so small.

text_block_list.name: Teensy Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thanks, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Pint-size Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure... It's no biggie! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What was that dream just now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh. My body feels so light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Narita Taishin's back in tip top shape!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! My body...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Why am I getting bigger and bigger?!

text_block_list.name: Teensy Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Taishin, Taishi... Tai...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What? What are you saying?! Did I get too big to
hear them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! Why is this happening?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Aagh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yikes. That was a weird nightmare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin's condition doesn't improve at all...
